name: Asparagus Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Blend in the asparagus puree, melted chocolate, and vanilla extract.
3. In a separate bowl, mix flour with baking soda.
4. Alternately add the dry mixture and buttermilk to the creamed mixture, stirring gently after each addition.
5. Pour the batter into 2, 8-inch cake pans.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cakes to cool in the pans for 10 minutes before removing them and placing them on wire racks to cool completely.
8. Fill and frost with chocolate frosting once cooled.
